game.runtime_demo.name: Runtime Demo
game.runtime_demo.description: Move @ to X. Enter saves and exits.
game.runtime_demo.detail: This official package validates the unified manifest-driven runtime, package-local resources, fixed-tick event loop, canvas rendering and best score protocol.
game.runtime_demo.msg_reach_goal: Reach X with as few steps as possible.
game.runtime_demo.msg_new_best: New best record. Press Enter to save and exit.
game.runtime_demo.msg_goal_reached: Goal reached. Press Enter to save and exit.
